title: ageratina neblinensis
intro: Ageratina neblinensis, also known as Neblina mountain snakeroot, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ageratina neblinensis include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Ageratina neblinensis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support digestive and immune system health.
